title: Space's Better Stuff
description: This mod aims to add many improvements to the game such as an End Update, Deep Dark Update and much much more. The current version of the mod has added new features in the end; the mod is in active development and will continue to receive new features!
body: This Mod is currently still under development, it will continue to recieve new updates. It currently overhauls the end dimension to add 2 new biomes, a new wood type, a boss, a new weapon, some new mobs and a new boss arena structure. Disclaimer: Screenshots provided in the mod gallery are taken with Shaders enabled. If you want to achieve similar results, it is recommended to use Solas, Bliss, Complementary or Mellow shaders based on personal opinion and performance. Note: Biomes are saved as structures for technical reasons. Unused assets will be deleted or utilised in upcoming versions.
